privacy_s1_p1: GrewMe is an educational platform designed to track and visualize student learning progress through skill radar charts. The platform is operated by your school ("School Name") and is used exclusively for educational purposes within your institution.
privacy_s1_p2: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact us at:
privacy_s2_intro: We collect the following categories of information:
privacy_s2_li1: Student information: name, learning scores, skill assessments, and classroom data
privacy_s2_li2: Parent/guardian information: name and email address
privacy_s2_li3: Teacher information: name, email address, and school affiliation
privacy_s2_footer: We do not collect unnecessary personal information. All data collected is directly related to the educational purpose of the platform.
privacy_s3_intro: Information collected is used solely for educational purposes, including:
privacy_s3_li1: Generating skill radar charts to visualize student learning progress
privacy_s3_li2: Tracking progress over time across multiple subject areas
privacy_s3_li3: Facilitating communication between teachers and parents/guardians
privacy_s3_li4: Enabling school administrators to monitor classroom performance
privacy_s3_footer: We do NOT use data for advertising, profiling, or any non-educational purpose.
privacy_s4_p1: GrewMe complies with the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA). We take the privacy of children under 13 very seriously.
privacy_s4_li1: We collect children's personal information only with verifiable parental consent
privacy_s4_li2: Parents can review their child's data at any time through the parent dashboard
privacy_s4_li3: Parents can request deletion of their child's data at any time
privacy_s4_li4: Parents can refuse further collection or use of their child's information
privacy_s4_li5: We do not condition a child's participation on the disclosure of more personal information than is reasonably necessary
privacy_s5_intro: As a parent or guardian, you have the right to:
privacy_s5_li1: Review all personal information collected about your child
privacy_s5_li2: Export your child's data in JSON format via the parent dashboard
privacy_s5_li3: Request deletion of your child's personal information
privacy_s5_li4: Revoke consent for future data collection at any time
privacy_s5_li5: Correct inaccurate information about your child
privacy_s5_footer: To exercise these rights, log into the parent dashboard or contact us at
privacy_s6_p1: We do NOT share, sell, rent, or disclose personal information to third parties.
privacy_s6_li1: Teachers assigned to the student's classroom
privacy_s6_li2: School administrators within the same institution
privacy_s6_li3: The student's parents or legal guardians
privacy_s6_footer: We may disclose information if required by law or to comply with a valid legal process.
privacy_s7_intro: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data:
privacy_s7_li1: All personally identifiable information (PII) is encrypted at rest using AES-256
privacy_s7_li2: All data in transit is protected by TLS 1.3
privacy_s7_li3: Access is controlled by role-based permissions
privacy_s7_li4: All data access is logged for audit purposes
privacy_s8_li1: Active accounts: Data is retained while the account is active
privacy_s8_li2: Deleted accounts: Personal information is anonymized after a 30-day grace period
privacy_s8_li3: Audit logs: Retained for 7 years in compliance with FERPA requirements
privacy_s8_li4: Expired consents: Contact information associated with expired consents is deleted
privacy_s9_intro: All users have the right to:
privacy_s9_li1: Access all personal information we hold about you
privacy_s9_li2: Correct inaccurate or incomplete personal information
privacy_s9_li3: Request deletion of your personal information
privacy_s9_li4: Export your data in a machine-readable format (JSON)
privacy_s9_li5: Revoke consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing
privacy_s10_p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify parents and guardians via email of any material changes before they take effect. Your continued use of GrewMe after receiving such notification constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy_s10_p2: We encourage you to review this policy periodically to stay informed about how we protect your information.
privacy_s11_p1: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:
terms_s1_p1: By accessing or using GrewMe ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Service. These terms apply to all users, including teachers, parents/guardians, and school administrators.
terms_s2_intro: GrewMe is an educational learning platform designed to track and visualize student learning progress through skill radar charts. The Service facilitates:
terms_s2_li1: Student skill assessment and progress tracking
terms_s2_li2: Visual representation of learning outcomes via radar charts
terms_s2_footer: The Service is provided exclusively for educational use within participating schools and institutions.
terms_s3_intro: Access to GrewMe is by invitation only. Accounts are created by school administrators and assigned to teachers, parents, and other authorized personnel. By using the Service, you agree to:
terms_s3_li1: Provide accurate and complete information when creating your account
terms_s3_li2: Maintain the confidentiality of your login credentials
terms_s3_li3: Be responsible for all activity that occurs under your account
terms_s3_li4: Notify your school administrator immediately of any unauthorized use of your account
terms_s3_li5: Not share your account credentials with others
terms_s4_intro: The Service is provided exclusively for educational purposes. You agree to use GrewMe only for lawful purposes and in a manner consistent with its educational mission. You must not:
terms_s4_li1: Use the Service for any commercial or non-educational purpose
terms_s4_li2: Access or attempt to access data belonging to other users without authorization
terms_s4_li3: Upload or transmit harmful, offensive, or inappropriate content
terms_s4_li4: Attempt to interfere with or disrupt the Service or its servers
terms_s4_li5: Use automated means to access or scrape the Service
terms_s4_li6: Violate any applicable laws or regulations, including COPPA and FERPA
terms_s5_p1: The GrewMe platform, including its design, software, features, and content (excluding user-submitted data), is owned by GrewMe and protected by intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or reverse engineer any part of the Service without prior written permission.
terms_s5_p2: You retain ownership of any educational content you submit to the Service. By submitting content, you grant GrewMe a limited license to use that content solely for providing the Service.
terms_s6_intro: GrewMe is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law:
terms_s6_li1: We do not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted or error-free
terms_s6_li2: We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service
terms_s6_li3: Our total liability to you shall not exceed the amounts paid by your institution for the Service in the preceding 12 months
terms_s7_intro: Your access to the Service may be terminated by your school administrator or by GrewMe at any time for violation of these Terms. Upon termination:
terms_s7_li1: Your right to access the Service ceases immediately
terms_s7_li2: Your data will be handled in accordance with our Privacy Policy
terms_s7_li3: You may request an export of your data within 30 days of termination
terms_s8_p1: These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable law. Any disputes arising from these terms or your use of the Service shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation, followed by mediation if necessary.
terms_s9_p1: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:
consent_declined_body: You have declined consent. No data will be collected about your child.
consent_granted_alert: Consent granted! Your account has been created. Redirecting...
consent_notice_body: A teacher has requested to add your child to GrewMe, an educational learning platform. Before we can collect any information about your child, we need your consent.
consent_collect_li2: Daily learning scores and skill assessments
consent_use_body: Solely for educational purposes: tracking learning progress, generating skill radar charts, and providing feedback to teachers and parents. We do NOT use data for advertising.
consent_access_body: Only assigned teachers, school administrators, and you (the parent/guardian).
consent_rights_body: You may review, export, request deletion of, or refuse further collection of your child's data at any time from your parent dashboard.
consent_privacy_agree: By granting consent, you agree to our
